channel.title: Neerav Patel — Purple Team & Digital Forensics
channel.description: Updates on VAPT, digital forensics, purple team operations, malware analysis, and security research from Neerav Patel.

item.title: Purple Team Lab published on GitHub
item.description: Launched an open purple team lab documenting red team methodology, blue team detections, digital forensics workflow, OSINT investigation process, and a full home-lab build guide.

item.title: Portfolio site live
item.description: Neerav Patel's cybersecurity portfolio is now live — covering VAPT, digital forensics and cyber crime investigation, purple team operations, malware analysis, and threat intelligence.
